name: How long does it take to show up in ChatGPT answers?
description: Small gains can happen in weeks, but reliable visibility usually takes longer and builds gradually.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to show up in ChatGPT answers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Some changes can help within weeks, but meaningful visibility often takes longer because ChatGPT is influenced by crawlable content, indexing, and third-party mentions. If you are starting from weak online presence, expect a gradual improvement rather than an instant jump.
acceptedAnswer.description: Small gains can happen in weeks, but reliable visibility usually takes longer and builds gradually.
